hero.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
hero.subtitle: No hidden fees. No surprises. Choose the plan that fits your needs and start sourcing smarter.

plans.name: Free Buyer
plans.description: For buyers who want to source parts efficiently.

plans.name: Seller Pro
plans.description: For professional sellers and auto parts shops.
features: Pay only when you win a deal

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For large businesses and multi-branch shops.

questions.q: Is there a fee to post a request?
questions.a: No. Posting a part request is completely free for all buyers.

questions.q: How is the seller commission calculated?
questions.a: Sellers pay a small percentage of the deal value upon successful sale. The exact rate is displayed during registration.

questions.q: Are there any monthly subscription fees?
questions.a: No. There are no monthly fees for buyers or sellers. You only pay when value is delivered.
